metadata.title: Synaply - AI ukhamarak Spaced Repetition ukanakamp vocabulario yatiqañataki
metadata.description: Arunaka yatiqañataki ch'amancht'aña AI-powered spaced repetition ukanakamp. Sapa mayni arunaka lutanaka luraña jan ukax jaqinakamp uñt'ayata lutanakat yatiqaña.
metadata.keywords: inglés yatiqaña, spaced repetition, vocabulario luraña, flashcards, AI arunaka yatiqaña, arunaka lutanaka, arunaka yatiqañataki app, español yatiqaña, francés yatiqaña, alemán yatiqaña, arunaka uñt'aña, arunaka amtaña, SRS yatiqaña
metadata.og_description: Arunaka yatiqañataki ch'amancht'aña AI-powered spaced repetition ukanakamp. Juk'amp jank'aki yatiqaña, juk'amp pacha amtaña.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Arunaka Yatiqaña App Interface
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Arunaka Machaqanaka Yatiqaña Ch'ama lurañampi
metadata.twitter_description: Synaply ukaruw uñt'ayasiñama vocabulario jach'anchayañataki smart spaced repetition ukhamarak AI ukanakamp.

landing.hero_title: Neural Synapses Luraña {br} Arunaka Suma Arsuñataki
landing.hero_subtitle: Synaply-x yatichawi thakhinakampi lutanaka luraña juman p'iqiman, AI-mp ch'amanchata ukhamat jan sapa mayni arunaka armañataki.
landing.og_image_alt: Synaply App Interface - AI-powered vocabulary learning dashboard
landing.feature_subtitle: Nanakan sistemax amtañan neurologico lurawinakaparuw uñch'uki. Yatichawi thakhinakaw lutanaka sapa mayni arunaka yatiqatamampi lurañataki.
landing.card_fsrs_desc: FSRS thakhiw apnaqt'ata, lutanaka thakhinaka lurañataki ukhamarak ch'amanchañataki, amtañama jan chhaqañataki suma yatichawimpi.
landing.card_lang_desc: Español, francés ukhamarak yaqha arunaka icelandic jan ukax vietnamese — Synaply-x sapa mayni yatiqirinakarux ch'amancharaki.
landing.card_lang_tag: Kuna arsa yatiqañ munta uk yatiqañama
landing.card_ai_desc: Yatiqata arunakamampiw Gemini AI-x sapa maynitaki uñacht'awinaka ukhamarak lurañanak lurayaraki.
landing.card_ai_interactive: Mayachata Lurañanaka: Jan jank'aki uñt'ayawi juman apnaqatamata.
landing.context_desc: Janiwa arunakaki yatiqañamäkiti, apnaqañawa yatiqañama. Gemini AI-x sapa mayni vocabulariomaru uñtasita uñacht'awinakaw luraraki.
landing.personalized_desc: Nanakan sistemax juman yatiqatamaru uñtasitaw apasi, ukhamat juk'amp ch'ama arunakar uñch'ukiñataki.
landing.precision_desc: Akapachana juk'amp suma jaqokipiri thakhinaka apnaqt'ata, ukhamat cheqa ukhamarak natural arunaka yatiqañataki.
landing.step1_desc: Jan uñt'at aru jikxatasta? Juman lutanakamaru uñt'ayasiñama. Nanakan sistemax jan jank'akiw uka machaq yatichawi neural thakhimpiru uñt'ayaraki.
landing.step2_desc: Nanakan thakhix arunaka sapa mayni pachan jikxatayaraki jan armañataki. Sapa uñakipt'awix lutanaka ch'amancharaki, amtañama wiñayataki lurañataki.
landing.step3_desc: Yatiñama apnaqañama. AI Yatichirix arunaka luraraki juman p'iqima machaq lutanaka sapa mayni pachan apnaqañapataki.
landing.step4_desc: Yatiqatam uñch'ukiñama. Lutanaka suma lurasitax, arux "machaq" ukata "wiñaya yatiñaru" sararaki.
landing.seo_subtitle: Kunjamsa nanakan yatichawi thakhix neural lutanaka luri ukhamarak ch'amanchi, AI-mp yanapata.
landing.seo_p1: Akapachana, machaq aru yatiqañax juk'ampix janiwa munañakiti—yaqha markanaka, lurañanaka ukhamarak jach'a yatiñanaka uñt'añatakiwa. Ukampis, juk'amp ch'amax janiwa qalltañakiti; amtañawa. Tradicional thakhinakax "armañ kurbaparuw" apasiraki, ukan machaq arunaka jan jank'akiw armata sapa mayni yatiqatawa. Synaply-x aka ch'ama askichañataki lurasitawa cognitive science ukhamarak AI thakhinakamp mayachata.
landing.seo_fsrs_p1: Synaply chuymax Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler (FSRS) thakhiniwa. Yaqha app-naka SM-2 thakhi apnaqapkis ukanakatx sipansa, FSRS-x machaq thakhiniwa amtañama suma uñch'ukiñataki.
landing.seo_fsrs_p2: Nanakan FSRS+ ch'amanchawixa juk'amp askiwa. Juman yatiqatam uñch'uki—kunjams aru amtañama, kuna arunak ch'amanchaña, ukhamarak juman armañataki pachanaka. Sapa mayni aru pachan jikxatañataki, Synaply-x uñakipt'añ pacha uñacht'ayaraki, ukhamat suma amtañataki.
landing.seo_fsrs_vs_sm2_p1: SM-2-x lurañanaka apnaqi, ukampis FSRS-x Stochastic Shortest Path thakhi apnaqi wiñaya amtañataki. Yatichawinakax uñacht'ayi FSRS-x 30% pacha jisk'achaspa, ukampis amtañax kikparakiwa.
landing.seo_forgetting_p1: Hermann Ebbinghaus "Forgetting Curve" uñacht'ayi kunjams yatiñanakax chhaqi jan ch'amanchata. Jan ch'amanchataxa, jaqinakax 50% yatiñanaka 24 horan armapxi. Synaply-x aka kurba jark'aqañataki lurasitawa.
landing.seo_forgetting_quote: Wiñaya amtañataki yanapaxa janiwa kutin kutin arsuñakiti; pachan amtañawa. P'iqiru aru amtañataki ch'amanchasaxa, lutanaka wiñayataki ch'amanchtan.
landing.seo_forgetting_p2: FSRS thakhimpi apnaqasaxa, janiwa arunaka jan amuyata uñacht'ayapkiti. Juman p'iqima ch'amanchat pachan uñacht'ayapxi, ukhamat lutanaka 300% juk'amp ch'amani lurañataki normales thakhinakatx sipansa.
landing.seo_tech_stack_p1: Aru sapa mayni yatiqañax janiwa suma lurañakiti. Aru suma apnaqañataki, contexto uñt'añama. AI-x juman jach'a yanapirirakiwa:
landing.seo_tech_stack_li1: DeepL Precision: Sapa aru uñt'ayañataki DeepL apnaqtan—akapachana juk'amp suma jaqokipiri engine ukhama uñt'atawa. Ukhamata yatiñanakax natural ukhamarak cheqawa.
landing.seo_tech_stack_li2: Gemini AI Yatichiri: Synaply-x Google Gemini AI apnaqi juman sapa maynitaki uñacht'awinaka lurañataki. Business context-ana yatiqasktaxa, Gemini-x ukar uñtasita uñacht'awinak luraraki.
landing.seo_tech_stack_li3: Interactive Feedback: AI Practice pachanxa, Gemini-x yatichirjamaw luraraki. Janiwa pantasitak siskiti; kunatsa uk uñt'ayaraki ukhamarak suma arsuñataki yanapt'araki.
landing.seo_cognitive_p1: Yatiqirinaka qalltata jaytañataki mä razonax "overwhelm" ukawa. Sint'i arunaka uñch'ukiñax ch'amawa. Synaply-x Cognitive Load Balancing apnaqi. AI-x juman lurañama uñch'uki, jan jank'aki machaq arunaka uñt'ayasa reviews ch'amancharaki.
landing.seo_cognitive_p2: Ukhamata "Flow State" ukan jikxatasta—mä psychological state juman suma yatiñataki. Yatiqañax munañaruw tukuraki.
landing.seo_core_features_p1: Synaply-x janiwa flashcard app-kiti; AI-powered language-learning ecosystem ukawa. Nanakan lurawinakax sapa mayni thakhi yanapañataki lurasitawa:
landing.seo_core_features_li1: 114+ Arunaka: Español, francés ukata icelandic jan ukax vietnamese, nanakan plataformax sapa mayni markanakar yanapt'araki.
landing.seo_core_features_li2: AI-Powered Practice: Vocabulario jach'anchayañataki Gemini AI-mp uñacht'awinaka luraña.
landing.seo_core_features_li3: Smart Playlists: Lutanaka mayachaña sapa mayni yatiqaña munañamataki.
landing.seo_core_features_li4: Progress Analytics: Yatiqatam uñch'ukiña detallata estadisticas-ampi. "Memory Rating" jach'anchayañataki.
landing.seo_social_p1: Aru yatiqañax janiwa sapa maynikiti. Synaply-x markachirinakampi yanapt'araki uñacht'awinaka ukhamarak yatichawi thakhinaka mayachañataki. Akapachan apnaqata arunaka uñt'añataki.
landing.seo_use_cases_title: Real-World Use Cases: Kunjams Synaply Jakaña Mayjacharaki
landing.seo_use_case1_p1: "Technical German yatiqañ munayä lurañajaru. Nayra app-nakax janiwa yanapkituti. Synaply-mpiwa engineering arunaka luraña, ukhamarak AI-x profesional emails lurañataki yanapt'itu. Qallta reunión ukan suma parlt'awaytxa!"
landing.seo_use_case2_p1: "SAT vocabulario lurañax ch'amänwa. Synaply-x yatiqañajaru yanapt'itu, FSRS thakhimpixa arunaka yatiqatajarux janiwa armkti."
landing.seo_faq_q1: Kunjamsa FSRS Anki-txa sipansa juk'amp askiwa?
landing.seo_faq_a1: Anki-x ch'amanikiwa, ukampis SM-2 thakhi apnaqi. Synaply-x FSRS apnaqi, yatichawimp uñt'ata juk'amp suma lurawi. Synaply-x AI (Gemini/DeepL) apnaqi, Anki-x lutanaka sapa mayni lurañawa.
landing.seo_faq_a2: Jïsa! Progressive Web App (PWA) yanapt'araki jan internet-an apnaqañataki. Pacha internet uñstani ukhax sync lurarakiniwa.
landing.seo_faq_a3: Synaply offers a generous free tier that includes access to all core FSRS features and a limited number of AI-powered translations and practices per day.
landing.cta_subtitle: Synaply-ru uñt'ayasiñama ukhamarak machaq AI system aru yatiqañataki yant'aña.

common.title: Suti
common.footer_help_text: Yanapt'asipxam! Juman amuyunaka, pantasitanaka jan ukax machaq lurawinaka mayipxam:

dashboard.delete_all_confirm: TAQPACHA arunaka pichañ muni? Aka lurawixa janiwa kutañ utjkiti.

dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Janiwa arunaka yatiqañataki utjkiti. Machaq arunaka yapuchañama!
dashboard.footer_help_text: Yanapt'asipxam! Juman amuyunaka, pantasitanaka jan ukax machaq lurawinaka mayipxam:

dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Topic uñt'ayañama juman sapa mayni uñacht'awinaka lurañataki!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Jan uñt'ayañanixa, juman vocabulariomat uñacht'awinak lurani.

onboarding.strategy_desc: Synaply suma apnaqañataki, aka thakhi yanapt'itu:
onboarding.step1_desc: 100 arunaka yapuchañama mä sapa topic-ta (e.g., Business jan ukax Travel).
onboarding.step3_desc: AI Practice-ru sarama arunaka sapa mayni contexto ukan apnaqañataki.

dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: e.g. Words for a business meeting about marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Aka {count} arunaka yaqha jaqinakar uñt'ayasiñama. Public Lists gallery ukan uñstani.

ai_word_info.error_generic: AI insights jan jikxatata. Mayampi yant'aña!
